summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Digital Badge & Certification Generation Software. All major features tested successfully including admin login, dashboard statistics, CRUD operations, credential issuance workflow, and public verification.

minor_issues.issue: CSV export returns CSV data but test expects JSON response
minor_issues.impact: Test parsing issue only - functionality works correctly

minor_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with hero section, features, quick verification
Admin login with credentials admin@example.com / admin123
Dashboard shows correct statistics (10 recipients, 6 templates, 11 credentials)
Recipients CRUD operations (view list, add new recipient, edit, delete)
Templates CRUD operations (view list, create template, edit, delete)
Credential issuance workflow (select recipient, select template, issue credential)
Public verification page works with valid credential code
Public verification shows invalid result for bad codes
